audit_status.source_base: Hebrew Deuteronomy / Devarim centralized-worship, slaughter, blood, and anti-idolatry law, draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: First-pass draft reviewed for destruction of local cult sites, the chosen place, household rejoicing, local slaughter, blood prohibition, Levite inclusion, vow/holy-gift centralization, land expansion, and child-sacrifice warning.

verses.restored: These are statutes and judgments you shall keep to do in land YHWH Divine of your fathers gives you to possess, all days you live upon ground.
You shall surely destroy all places where nations whom you dispossess served their gods, upon high mountains, hills, and under every leafy tree.
You shall tear down their altars, smash their pillars, burn their Asherah poles with fire, cut down carved images of their gods, and destroy their name from that place.
You shall not do so to YHWH your Divine.
But to place YHWH your Divine chooses from all your tribes to put his name there, to his dwelling you shall seek, and there you shall come.
There you shall bring burnt offerings, sacrifices, tithes, contribution of your hand, vows, freewill offerings, and firstborn of herd and flock.
There you shall eat before YHWH your Divine and rejoice, you and your households, in all undertaking of your hand in which YHWH your Divine blessed you.
You shall not do according to all we do here today, each man whatever is right in his own eyes,
for until now you have not come to rest and inheritance YHWH your Divine gives you.
When you cross Jordan and dwell in land YHWH your Divine causes you to inherit, and he gives rest from all enemies around and you dwell securely,

then to place YHWH your Divine chooses to cause his name to dwell, there you shall bring all I command: burnt offerings, sacrifices, tithes, contribution of your hand, and all choice vows you vow to YHWH.
You shall rejoice before YHWH your Divine—you, your sons, daughters, male servants, female servants, and Levite within your gates, for he has no portion or inheritance with you.
Guard yourself lest you offer burnt offerings in every place you see.
Only in place YHWH chooses in one of your tribes, there you shall offer burnt offerings and there do all I command you.
Yet with all desire of your soul/life you may slaughter and eat meat within all your gates, according to blessing YHWH your Divine gives you; unclean and clean may eat it, like gazelle and deer.
Only blood you shall not eat; upon earth you shall pour it like water.
You may not eat within your gates tithe of grain, new wine, oil, firstborn of herd or flock, any vow you vow, freewill offering, or contribution of your hand.

But before YHWH your Divine you shall eat them in place YHWH your Divine chooses—you, your son, daughter, male servant, female servant, and Levite within your gates—and rejoice before YHWH your Divine in all undertaking of your hand.
Guard yourself lest you abandon Levite all your days upon your ground.
When YHWH your Divine enlarges your border as he spoke to you and you say, I will eat meat, because your soul/life desires to eat meat, according to all desire of your soul/life you may eat meat.

If place YHWH your Divine chooses to put his name there is far from you, you may slaughter from herd and flock YHWH gives you, as I commanded you, and eat within your gates according to all desire of your soul/life.
As gazelle and deer are eaten, so you may eat it; unclean and clean together may eat it.
Only be strong not to eat blood, for blood is soul/life; you shall not eat soul/life with flesh.
You shall not eat it; upon earth you shall pour it like water.
You shall not eat it, so it may be well with you and your children after you, when you do right in eyes of YHWH.
Only your holy things that are yours and your vows you shall carry and come to place YHWH chooses.
You shall make burnt offerings, flesh and blood, upon altar of YHWH your Divine; blood of your sacrifices shall be poured upon altar of YHWH your Divine, and flesh you shall eat.
Keep and listen to all these words I command you, so it may be well with you and your children after you forever, when you do good and right in eyes of YHWH your Divine.
When YHWH your Divine cuts off nations where you are entering to dispossess them, and you dispossess them and dwell in their land,

guard yourself lest you are ensnared after them, after they are destroyed from before you, and lest you inquire concerning their gods, saying, How did these nations serve their gods? I also will do likewise.
You shall not do so to YHWH your Divine, for every abomination YHWH hates they did for their gods; even their sons and daughters they burned in fire to their gods.
All word I command you, it you shall keep to do; you shall not add to it or diminish from it.

translation_notes: The chosen-place theology centralizes sacrificial worship and later becomes foundational for Jerusalem, though Jerusalem is not named in this chapter.

Commands to destroy altars, pillars, sacred trees, images, and names are ancient anti-idolatry law and must never authorize modern destruction of another community's sacred sites, art, or cultural memory.
Centralization is repeatedly paired with household rejoicing that includes daughters, servants, and Levites.
Local slaughter for ordinary meat is permitted when the sanctuary is distant; ritual status does not bar people from the meal.
Blood is treated as life and returned to earth rather than consumed.
The child-burning warning condemns sacrificial killing of children; it must not become xenophobic caricature of all neighboring religions.
Conquest framing and inhabiting others' land remain morally contested and cannot serve modern territorial claims.
safety_note: Do not use Deuteronomy 12 to justify iconoclasm, destruction of Indigenous or minority sacred places, forced religious centralization, colonial dispossession, or exclusion from communal food. Center shared rejoicing, care for Levites, reverence for life in blood, and rejection of child sacrifice.
